scripts.dev: dotenvx run -f .env.local -- sh -c 'npx convex dev --env-file .env.convex & pnpm --filter marketing dev & pnpm --filter dashboard dev'
scripts.dev:marketing: dotenvx run -f .env.local -- sh -c 'npx convex dev --env-file .env.convex & pnpm --filter marketing dev'
scripts.dev:dashboard: dotenvx run -f .env.local -- sh -c 'npx convex dev --env-file .env.convex & pnpm --filter dashboard dev'
scripts.codegen: dotenvx run -f .env.local -f .env.convex -- sh -c 'if [ -n "${CONVEX_DEPLOY_KEY:-}" ] && [ "${CONVEX_DEPLOY_KEY#replace-with-your-}" = "$CONVEX_DEPLOY_KEY" ]; then npx convex codegen; else echo "Skipping convex codegen (CONVEX_DEPLOY_KEY missing/placeholder)."; fi'
scripts.build: pnpm run codegen && pnpm --filter marketing build && pnpm --filter dashboard build
scripts.build:marketing: pnpm run codegen && pnpm --filter marketing build
scripts.build:dashboard: pnpm run codegen && pnpm --filter dashboard build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter marketing test && pnpm --filter dashboard test
scripts.check: pnpm run lint && pnpm run format:check && pnpm run test && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run build
